title: Clompanus caudata
taxonomy: Clompanus caudata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee family. The classification of Clompanus caudata places it within the genus Clompanus, which is further grouped under the family Rubiaceae and the order Gentianales. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is known for its distinctive characteristics, including its long, thin leaves and clusters of small, white flowers. The classification of Clompanus caudata is an ongoing area of research and may be subject to revision as new information becomes available.
